Plot Method for mixLCA

plot.mixLCA.Rd

Single dispatch surface for all built-in visualisations.

Usage

# S3 method for class 'mixLCA'
plot(x,
                     type = c("profiles", "bvr", "distal",
                              "uncertainty", "convergence",
                              "categorical", "spectral_scree",
                              "spectral_loadings"),
                     ...)

Arguments

x

A fitted mixLCA object.

type

One of "profiles", "bvr", "distal", "uncertainty", "convergence", "categorical", "spectral_scree", or "spectral_loadings".

...

Forwarded to the underlying plotting routine (e.g.\ data for "bvr" and "distal", variable for "distal", ci for "profiles", dimension for "spectral_loadings").

Value

A ggplot object.
